zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Sydenham於1267年出生在英國薩默塞特希登哈姆時，他的父親John de Sydenham II32歲，母親Isabella de Kittesford33歲。他於1298年與Joan Gothayte在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希登哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年在英國薩默塞特享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Sydenham于1267年出生在英国薩默塞特希登哈姆时，他的父亲John de Sydenham II32岁，母亲Isabella de Kittesford33岁。他于1298年与Joan Gothayte在英国英格兰薩默塞特希登哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年在英国薩默塞特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Sydenham was born in 1267, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, his father, John de Sydenham II, was 32 and his mother, Isabella de Kittesford, was 33. He married Joan Gothayte in 1298, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1346, in Somerset, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Sydenham est né en 1267, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Sydenham II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Kittesford, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Gothayte en 1298, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1346, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Sydenham 1267 in Sydenham, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Sydenham II 32 und seine Mutter Isabella de Kittesford 33. Er hat 1298 in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Joan Gothayte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Sydenham è nato il nel 1267 nel Sydenham, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John de Sydenham II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Kittesford, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan Gothayte nel 1298, nel Sydenham, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1346, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William De Sydenham(이)가 1267년 영국 서머세트 시데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sydenham II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Kittesford(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시데함에서 Joan Gothayte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 영국 서머세트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Sydenham nasceu em 1267, em Sydenham, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Sydenham II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Kittesford, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Gothayte em 1298, em Sydenham, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Sydenham родился в 1267 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Sydenham II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Kittesford, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Gothayte в 1298 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Sydenham nació en 1267, en Sydenham, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Sydenham II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabella de Kittesford, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan Gothayte en 1298, en Sydenham, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1346, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
